raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo pirms ta Płaufchana
ateet/ kad tas Auglis eenahzis
buhs/ un kad tas ne eenahzis
Kekkars jaw seededams eetekf/
tad nogreesihs winch taks Stih-
gas ar Zirpeem/ un tohs Sarrus
winch atneims un nokappahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee taps kohta atstahti
teent plehfigeem Putneem Kal-
nôs/ un teem Swehreem wirs
Semmes/ ka tee Putni tur par
Waffaru paleek/ un wiſſi Sweh-
ri tahs Semmes turpatt par
Seemu turrahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tann̄ Laikā taps tam
KUNGA M Zeboot Dahwanas
atnestas no tahs Tautas/ kas is-
kaisita un isplattita irr/ un no
tahs Tautas/ kas no fawa Ee-
fahkuma lihds fhahmehr bihjaja-
ma bija/ no tahs Tautas/ kas
Eschās nodallita un famihta irr/
kam tee (Affireti ta ka) Uppes
to Semmi nopohsta/us to Wee-
tu ta Wahrda ta KUNGA Ze-
baot/ us Zianas Raunu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "( Chi irr) ta Nasta
Dvafr Egipti. Rangi /
2. tas KUNGS branks
us weenn tschafiu Badebbesi/
un nahks us Egiptes-Semint.
Un tee Elka-Deewi Egiptes-
Semmē winna Preckschā dreb-
behs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es farihdinaſchu weentu
Egiptert prett to ohtrn/ ka tee
karrohs ifentrs prett fawu
Brahli/ un ifweens prett fawu
Tuwaku/ Pilfahts prett Pils-
fahtu/ Walstiba prett Walstibu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un to Egipteru Drohſchi-
ba isnihks winno Sirdi/ un
winno Padohmu es aprifschu/
tad watzaḥs tee fawus Deerwek-
tus/ un tohs Apinahnetajus/
un Sihlneekus un Sihmes-Zee-
nitajus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "lln es nodohschu tohs E-
gipterus bahrggeim Kungeein
Rohā/ un breeſmigam Rehni-
nam buhs pahr teem waldiht/
fakka tas Kungē KUNGS Ze-
baot.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Juhras Uhdens is-
kaltihs/ un ta Uppe isfiks un is-
nihs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Stranti notezzehs
taktu/ tee taps isfmelti/ un tee
ar Dambjeem stiprinati Strau-
ti iskaltihs/ Needra un Ascht
fawihtihs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas Saltums pee tahm
Uppem un Upju Mallahm/ un
wiſſ Sehjums pee teem Strau-
teem fawihtihs/ tas taps no-
stumts/ un ne buhs wairṣ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Sweineeki behdar-
fees/ un wiſſi/ kas to Makschke-
rt Uppēs mett/ schehlofees/ un
kas to Tihkli Uhdeni ismett
waldehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tee kas fmalkas Dshjas
ausch/ taps ar to Tihklu-Aude-
jeem Rauna.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
